title: Where we are & what's next
lede: SMB-tier boutique agency. Strategy locked, four demos in flight, site built but undeployed. The path to launch is gated on a small set of concrete blockers, not on more building.

sections.title: Strategy — locked
sections.sub: No open strategic decisions blocking. These are settled.

rows.v: Aletheia LLC + DBA for the brand
Personal LinkedIn first, business 1×/wk, no bought engagement
Fictional engagement scenarios, no fake named clients
Drafted (fictional, FAU comp-eng), needs real name/photo/city swap
Deferred, running under Aletheia DBA, picked before site deploy

sections.title: The four demos
sections.sub: Each locked to a fictional SMB persona. Shared stack (Next.js + Anthropic SDK + Zod), shared "verifiable answer" sales story.

cards.title: Email Triage
cards.mech: Sharpest mechanic: verifiable-answer enforcement. Eval 100% (6/6 categories, 0 schema errors).
cards.foot: Next: Gmail + Slack surfaces (labels/drafts, never auto-send)

cards.title: Resume Screening
cards.mech: Sharpest mechanic: JD-rubric + verified per-criterion citations + 3-layer injection defense + proactive PII redaction.
cards.foot: Pending: push feat/compliance-redaction, Sonnet validation run, screenshots

cards.title: Lead Scoring + AR Chase
cards.mech: Sharpest mechanic: hybrid scoring (deterministic + LLM rationale). Code complete locally, 12 commits, 117 tests green.
cards.foot: Blocked on API credits → full eval + GitHub push (repo empty) + Loom

cards.title: Booking Agent
cards.mech: Sharpest mechanic: compute_treatment_estimate with cited payer rules. Patching 4 known Phase-2 gaps.
cards.foot: Only demo not yet at Phase 3, no repo yet

sections.title: Blockers
sections.sub: What actually stands between "demos exist" and "first sales call."

items.title: Anthropic API credits drained
items.desc: Account balance ran dry 2026-05-19 mid-eval. Blocks lead-scoring full eval and every Loom recording. Top up at console.anthropic.com/billing.

items.title: Founder identity details
items.desc: Need real name + photo + city + prior-role one-liner to lock the LinkedIn bio and the site /about.

items.title: Booking agent behind
items.desc: Only demo not at Phase 3. Patch the 4 Phase-2 gaps, then it joins the other three.

items.title: Site undeployed
items.desc: Built at /home/library/vstorm-clone/. Waiting on brand-name finalization + founder bio before deploy.

sections.title: Security flag
sections.sub: Open item, logged repeatedly, do not skip.
sections.body: Rotate the Anthropic API key. The ANTHROPIC_API_KEY was pasted in chat (now drained). After topping up credits, rotate it before any further live runs. Tracked across multiple log entries; still open.

sections.title: Next steps — sequence
sections.sub: Dependency order. Each gate unlocks the next. Check items off as they land; ask about any item to dig in.

tasks.text: Top up Anthropic balance, then rotate the exposed key
Collect founder name / photo / city / prior-role one-liner
Lead-scoring: run full eval → push repo → tune cascade volume
Resume-screening: push feat/compliance-redaction, Sonnet validation, screenshots
Booking-agent: patch 4 gaps → Phase 3 → create repo
Record a 3–5 min Loom per demo (focus each one's sharpest mechanic)
Rewrite all READMEs as sales assets, not build docs
Push all four public repos clean
Pick brand name → search/replace → deploy site (Resend + Cal.com wired)
LinkedIn launch with founder bio; personal-first content sequence
Build the X strategy off the published algorithm
Swap one fictional case study for a real one; fill NA% placeholders

sections.title: Marketing must-do
sections.sub: New rule added to the wiki this session.
sections.heading: Consult the published X algorithm
paras: Before drafting any X / Twitter posting strategy, mine the open-sourced recommendation algorithm. X deliberately published it, so we have the real ranking logic instead of guessing.

How to apply: Extract the load-bearing ranking features (engagement types, recency, author reputation, media presence, reply/quote behavior, negative-feedback penalties) and translate them into concrete posting rules before locking the X content calendar.
Caveat: The snapshot is from 2023; treat it as ground truth on ranking mechanics, not current exact weights.
